focus: Morning market analysis & AI infrastructure trends
recentActivity: Amazon (AWS) is deepening its AI commitment with a strategic partnership with OpenAI, aiming to leverage AI to potentially push AWS annual revenue to $600B. Intel is pivoting capacity to AI-focused Xeon processors ahead of CEO Lip-Bu Tan's COMPUTEX 2026 keynote in June. Broad market sentiment remains fixated on data center infrastructure and electricity supply as critical scaling bottlenecks for AI.
